latin: Archimedes in balneum descendit et aquam surgentem observavit. subito intellexit quomodo volumen corporis metiri posset. tam laetus erat ut nudus per vias Syracusarum curreret clamans: 'heureka! heureka!'

questions.prompt: What did Archimedes notice in the bath?
What did Archimedes do after his discovery?
questions.target: He ran naked through the streets shouting
choices: He ran naked through the streets shouting
He stayed in the bath thinking

translation: Archimedes descended into the bath and observed the water rising. Suddenly he understood how he could measure the volume of a body. He was so happy that he ran naked through the streets of Syracuse shouting: 'Eureka! Eureka!'
